refnamediv.refpurpose: Fit a two-dimensional line to point coordinates.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Fits a line using the principal direction of the point covariance. The result is [vx vy x0 y0], where [vx vy] is a unit direction and [x0 y0] is the point centroid.

refsection.title: Examples
